test_steps: Confirm that Today exposes the synthetic VIP exception, queue impact and SandboxBadge before any decision surface.
Confirm that Approve repeats the ActionContractCard and DecisionBar without execution-like labels.
Confirm that History/Receipts exposes a synthetic receipt, verification code and explicit no-real-state evidence.
Confirm that Rollback explains documentary reversal limits rather than real schedule rollback.
Confirm that Degraded blocks any approval-looking path and keeps only safe documentary next steps visible.
expected_visible_evidence: Sandbox candidate-only. Dados sinteticos. Nenhum estado real foi tocado.
Estado real tocado? Nao. stateTouched: false
Gerar comprovante sintetico depois da decisao.
Decisao fica apenas na historia visual.

expected_decision_boundary.primary_decision: Operator may approve a one-time synthetic exception or keep the block.

expected_rollback_or_compensation.boundary: Rollback only changes the sandbox story and restores the default blocked narrative.

scenarios.expected_state_touched_label: Sandbox candidate-only. Dados sinteticos. Nenhum estado real foi tocado.
pass_conditions: The operator can explain ARIS will block, propose and document a synthetic exception.
The operator can explain ARIS will not book, message, charge or mutate a real schedule.
Risk and approval requirement are visible before any synthetic decision label.
Receipt and rollback surfaces both preserve the no-real-state message.
fail_conditions: Any screen hides will_not_do or stateTouched:false language.
Approval looks like direct execution or real booking release.
Receipt or rollback copy suggests real schedule reversal.
blocker_conditions: SandboxBadge missing from any required screen.
No visible evidence that the receipt is demo-only.
State touched label absent or contradictory.

test_steps: Confirm that Today and Approve present deterministic block and synthetic manual-review options without refund execution language.
Confirm that History/Receipts makes the refusal evidence scannable and still demo-only.
Confirm that Rollback/Undo explains compensation through documentary manual review, not money movement.
Confirm that Degraded blocks override-like actions and keeps the refusal boundary closed.

expected_decision_boundary.primary_decision: Keep the refund blocked or create a synthetic manual-review story.

expected_rollback_or_compensation.boundary: Compensation is a documentary queue only and cannot move real money.

scenarios.expected_state_touched_label: Estado real tocado? Nao. stateTouched: false
pass_conditions: The operator can explain the deterministic block and why risk is high.
The operator can explain there is no approval needed for the initial block, only for override-like review flow.
The operator can identify visible refusal evidence and manual-review compensation boundary.
fail_conditions: Manual review is read as live override of a refund.
Risk is visible but insufficient to justify the refusal.
Evidence or receipt is absent for the blocked/refused path.
blocker_conditions: Any wording implies a real payment action.
Degraded mode leaves an execution-looking refund control active.

test_steps: Confirm that Today and Approve describe interception, quarantine and human review without opening the attachment.
Confirm that decision labels remain synthetic and do not imply release of a real document or integration.
Confirm that History/Receipts documents the quarantine evidence and no-real-state boundary.
Confirm that Rollback describes controlled release only after documentary human review.
Confirm that Degraded mode keeps the quarantine path fail-closed.

expected_decision_boundary.primary_decision: Route to synthetic human review or keep quarantine.

expected_rollback_or_compensation.boundary: Release is only a controlled story after human documentary review.

scenarios.expected_state_touched_label: Sandbox candidate-only. Dados sinteticos. Nenhum estado real foi tocado.
pass_conditions: The operator can explain ARIS intercepts and documents the attachment without opening anything real.
The operator can explain human review is required for release-like movement.
Evidence and rollback boundary remain visible across approve, history and degraded contexts.
fail_conditions: The scenario reads like a live security product or live document action.
The quarantine reason is visible without the no-real-state boundary.
Rollback copy promises real release without review limits.
blocker_conditions: Any real-file, integration or production implication appears in the UI contract.
Receipt detail omits demo-only or no-real-state evidence.
CRISOL or product-ready language is implied.
